title: Mohammed V of Morocco becomes sultan of Morocco
fact: Mohammed al-Khamis bin Yusef bin Hassan al-Alawi, better known simply as Mohammed V, was the last Sultan of Morocco from 1927 to 1953 and from 1955 to 1957, and first King of Morocco from 1957 to 1961.

title: Ismail Ibn Sharif becomes sultan of Morocco
fact: Moulay Ismail Ibn Sharif was a Sultan of Morocco from 1672 to 1727, as the second ruler of the 'Alawi dynasty.

title: Yusef of Morocco becomes sultan of Morocco
fact: Moulay Yusef ben Hassan was the Alawi sultan of Morocco from 1912 to 1927.

title: Abd al-Hafid of Morocco becomes sultan of Morocco
fact: Abd al-Hafid ibn al-Hasan was the Sultan of Morocco from 1908 to 1912 and a member of the Alaouite Dynasty.

title: Ahmad al-Mansur becomes sultan of Morocco
fact: Ahmad al-Mansur, also known as al-Dhahabī was the Saadi Sultan of Morocco from 1578 to his death in 1603, the sixth and most famous of all rulers of the Saadis.

title: Hassan I of Morocco becomes sultan of Morocco
fact: Mawlay Hassan bin Mohammed, known as Hassan I was the sultan of Morocco from 16 September 1873 to 9 June 1894, as a ruler of the 'Alawi dynasty.

title: Abdelaziz of Morocco becomes sultan of Morocco
fact: Moulay Abd al-Aziz bin Hassan was sultan of Morocco from 9 June 1894 to 21 August 1908, as a ruler of the 'Alawi dynasty.

title: Mohammed Ben Aarafa becomes sultan of Morocco
fact: Mohammed Ben Aarafa, or Ben Arafa, was a paternal first cousin once removed of Sultan Mohammed V of Morocco; he was put on the throne by the French after they exiled Mohammed V to French-ruled Madagascar in August 1953.

title: Muhammad IV of Morocco becomes sultan of Morocco
fact: Mawlay Muhammad bin Abd al-Rahman, known as Muhammad IV, born in Fes in 1803 and died in Marrakesh in 1873, was the Sultan of Morocco from 28 August 1859 to 16 September 1873 as a ruler of the 'Alawi dynasty.

title: Abd al-Rahman of Morocco becomes sultan of Morocco
fact: Moulay Abd al-Rahman bin Hisham was Sultan of Morocco from 30 November 1822 to 28 August 1859, as a ruler of the 'Alawi dynasty.

title: Al-Rashid of Morocco becomes sultan of Morocco
fact: Moulay Al-Rashid ibn Sharif, known as Moulay Al-Rashid or Moulay Rachid, sometimes called Tafiletta by the English, was Sultan of Morocco from 1666 to 1672.

title: Slimane of Morocco becomes sultan of Morocco
fact: Mawlay Sulayman bin Mohammed, born on 28 June 1766 in Tafilalt and died on 28 November 1822 in Marrakesh, was a Sultan of Morocco from 1792 to 1822, as a ruler of the 'Alawi dynasty.

title: Abdallah of Morocco becomes sultan of Morocco
fact: Moulay Abdallah was the Sultan of Morocco six times between 1729 and 1757.
